title: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant Posts
description: Anna University has declared the official notification for 026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the Anna University Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
